[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / shader

# Method: shader()

```ts
shader(shader): void;
```

Set a custom shader for subsequent drawing operations.

The shader persists until explicitly reset via [resetShader](resetShader.md) or by calling `shader(null)`.
This behavior matches p5.js, allowing multiple draw calls with the same shader.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `shader` | [`TextmodeShader`](../../TextmodeShader.md) \| `null` | Custom shader to use, or `null` to reset to the default shader. |

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="shader" encoded-code="-" />
